strengths.title: No hardcoded secrets detected in source
Lock file present for reproducible builds

findings.title: Using FlatList instead of FlashList
findings.detail: FlashList provides significantly better performance for large lists (100+ items).

findings.title: No optimized image library detected
findings.detail: expo-image or react-native-fast-image provide better caching and performance.

findings.title: 10 component(s) exceed 250 lines
findings.detail: buildwithclaude/plugins/all-skills/skills/pptx/scripts/html2pptx.js (979 lines), buildwithclaude/web-ui/app/docs/installation/page.tsx (882 lines), buildwithclaude/web-ui/app/contribute/page.tsx (698 lines), buildwithclaude/web-ui/app/skills/skills-client.tsx (471 lines), buildwithclaude/web-ui/app/mcp-server/[slug]/page-client.tsx (467 lines), buildwithclaude/web-ui/app/plugins/plugins-client.tsx (447 lines), buildwithclaude/web-ui/app/page-client.tsx (381 lines), buildwithclaude/web-ui/app/mcp-servers/mcp-client.tsx (370 lines), buildwithclaude/scripts/fetch-official-mcp.js (343 lines), buildwithclaude/web-ui/components/installation-modal.tsx (284 lines)
findings.fix: Extract sub-components to improve readability and performance

findings.title: No error boundary detected
findings.detail: App crashes will show white screen instead of graceful error UI.
findings.fix: Add an ErrorBoundary component wrapping your root navigator

findings.title: No TypeScript configuration found
findings.detail: TypeScript significantly reduces runtime errors in React Native apps.
